selection_reason: WP6 advanced the source-only reward ledger ProofPacket bridge. WP7 is the final source-safe downstream closure item: define a learning_effect_review_v1 packet and validator that can decide continue, rollback, rotate, stop, or review-only promotion from reward_ledger_v1 evidence without runtime, DB, exchange, credential, order, Cost Gate, deploy, live, registry persistence, or bounded Demo outcome access.
objective: Implement a source-only learning_effect_review_v1 packet, builder, validator, hash, extractor, fail-closed decision priority, and tests for review-only learning effect decisions over caller-provided reward_ledger_v1 records.
acceptance_criteria: learning_effect_review_v1 packet and validator consume only caller-provided reward_ledger_v1 records and embedded source refs.
Decisions are exactly continue, rollback, rotate_candidate, stop_loss_control, stop_no_edge, stop_evidence, and promote_review_only.
Authority, invalid reward/source, loss-control, evidence/control/OOS/sample failures preempt continue and promote_review_only.
promote_review_only is review-only and grants no promotion, order, live, Cost Gate, model reload, symlink, serving reload, runtime, or DB authority.
Reward/proof/mutation refs are complete canonical sets derived from embedded reward records and cannot be forged or dropped after review_hash recompute.
Loss limits require all required fields with correct types; truthy breach strings fail closed.
Focused and adjacent source tests pass and no runtime/loss-control branch is consumed.
